case_title: SOMMERS BILL DBA BAYSIDE AUTO VS ALL CAR AUTO WRECKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,125.00 FILED BY SOMMERS BILL DBA BAYSIDE AUTO AS TO DEFENDANT ALL CAR AUTO WRECKER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
